Effective Date of Repeal, , , provided that:Pub. L. 104–178, § 1(c)110 Stat. 1565Aug. 6, 1996“The repeal made by subsection (a) [repealing this section] shall—“(1)take effect on the date of enactment of this Act []; andAug. 6, 1996“(2)apply with respect to any contract obtained, and any purchase or sale occurring, on or after the date of enactment of this Act.”
